vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix a bug caused by pip install setuptools>=49.4.0 for CPU backend
vllm.author: DamonFool
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Hi all,
When I use docker build -f Dockerfile.cpu -t vllm-cpu-env --shm-size=4g . to build a cpu docker, I find a file named =49.4.0 in the CPU docker instance. Please see the following picture for this bug.

It is caused by
RUN pip install --upgrade pip \
    && pip install wheel packaging ninja se

vllm.title: [Kernel] Add back batch size 1536 and 3072 to MoE tuning
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds back the batch size 1536 and 3072 in moe tuning. The batch sizes were mistakenly omitted during the refactoring #4921.

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Simplify model loading for `HfRunner`
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR removes the need to manually register new models for loading HuggingFace models in tests. Instead, you should now pass is_embedding_model or is_vision_model to the HfRunner to indicate how to load the model.

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Reducing CPU CI execution time
vllm.author: bigPYJ1151
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR optimized CPU CI execution by binding CPU cores to the local memory node, reducing the execution time from ~15 mins to ~10 mins.

vllm.title: [CI] mark AMD test as softfail to prevent blockage
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently all AMD test are failing and the device has been flaky/blocking build for the past weeks.
https://buildkite.com/vllm/ci/builds/9046

To prevent further blocking the engineering throughput, we are marking these as soft_fail so they won't block PR merges. Once the test is stable and fast for

vllm.title: [Misc] Add transformers version to collect_env.py
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: It would be useful to know the version of transformers installed as it is directly related to model support. Specifically this would have been nice to have in resolving this issue with Phi-3 #5244

vllm.title: [Misc] update collect env
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In #5246 for example, we can see:

[conda] Could not collectROCM Version: Could not collect

Two lines are concatenated.
We should add a newline in between.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix prompt_logprobs when SamplingParams.detokenize is set to False
vllm.author: zifeitong
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
prompt_logprobs is skipped currently when SamplingParams.detokenize is set to True.
This will enable a workaround of #4904 if the user only needs prompt_logprobs and not detokenized text.
